scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-none
scale.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#D4C5B9]

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetric bento layouts. Avoid perfect symmetry. Use col-span-8 and col-span-4 to create tension.

motion_and_3d.animations: Framer Motion. Use slow, easing transitions (duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]). Staggered text reveals.
motion_and_3d.3d_elements: React Three Fiber (R3F) for floating geometric objects (Torus, Icosahedron) in the Hero section background. Subtle parallax on scroll.
motion_and_3d.interactions: 3D tilt hover effects on project cards. Magnetic buttons. Custom mouse cursor tracking effect.

components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050505]/60 border-b border-white/5). Clean, minimal links.
components.hero: Full height (min-h-screen). Massive typography. Background features R3F canvas with slowly rotating floating geometries in dark materials with yellow/beige lighting. Primary CTA button with glowing hover state.
components.about_me: Asymmetric grid. Text on one side, professional portrait image with subtle noise overlay on the other.
components.projects: Vertical staggered list or asymmetric bento. Large image thumbnails. On hover: 3D tilt effect and image scaling. Yellow accents for 'View Project' buttons.
components.skills: Animated progress bars. Custom glowing icons. Monospace or uppercase labels.
components.contact: Clean Shadcn forms heavily styled. Inputs with bg-[#111111] border-white/10 focus:border-[#E6C229] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E6C229]. Large submit button pointing to ivanvilargomes@gmail.com.
components.footer: Massive 'Gomes Webdesign' watermark text. Social links. Minimalist padding py-20.

images.description: El Pollo Loco - Food Delivery App Mockup

hero.slogan: Moderne digitale Erlebnisse. Technisch beeindruckend. Optisch makellos.

about.title: Über mich
about.description: Ich bin Ivan Vilar Gomes, ein Frontend-Entwickler und UI/UX-Designer, der sich darauf spezialisiert hat, außergewöhnliche Web-Erlebnisse zu erschaffen.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: Install @studio-freight/lenis for smooth scroll (or similar modern smooth scrolling).
Set up Tailwind with the custom color palette provided.
Add 'Clash Display' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts or standard imports in layout/index.css.
Create a Canvas element in the Hero background with floating 3D geometry using R3F.
Use framer-motion for page load reveals and scroll-triggered animations.
Implement a custom mouse cursor using framer-motion that tracks the pointer.
For project cards, implement a 3D tilt hover effect (can use framer-motion useMotionValue/useTransform or a custom CSS wrapper).
Ensure the contact form logic handles form state cleanly.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex asymmetric bento layouts; heavily customize Shadcn for inputs/forms if used.
Ensure text contrast ratios are accessible (use text-shadow where needed over 3D backgrounds).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
